description_long: This is a classical-style bust sculpture depicting a male figure with curly hair and a strong, idealized facial structure. The figure is adorned in a draped garment, fastened with a decorative brooch on the right shoulder, and the folds of the fabric are rendered with fine detail. The bust is mounted on a simple, round pedestal base, giving it a sense of stability and prominence. The surface is smooth and appears to be made of white marble or a similar stone, with subtle shadows accentuating the sculpted features. The overall form is symmetrical, with the head turned slightly to the right, and the back of the bust is less detailed, focusing on the hair and the drapery. There are no visible inscriptions, plaques, or artist signatures on the sculpture.
description: A white marble bust of a curly-haired male figure in classical attire, mounted on a round pedestal with finely detailed drapery and a smooth finish.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the head with detailed curls and the draped garment extending over the shoulders, with the pedestal base visible.
description_view_1: Right-front angled view highlighting the facial profile, intricate hair, and the decorative brooch fastening the draped garment.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the full face, symmetrical features, and the elaborate folds of the garment across the chest.
description_view_3: Left-rear angled view focusing on the back of the head, the drapery, and the curvature of the bust's shoulders.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture is isolated against a plain background.
